_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 6 currently banned, 3697 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 3697 (up from 3636, +61). 6 IPs currently banned (down from 7). Continued brute-force activity from botnets. Only authorized activity from novakj.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 55 usages across 19 files: viewer.js(4), bookmarks.js(4), annotate.js(2), img2pdf.js(3), upload.js(2), merge.js(4), pages.js(4), split.js(6), redact.js(3), signatures.js(2), text-overlay.js(2), ocr.js(1), crop.js(2), forms.js(2), compare.js(2), insert-pages.js(7), metadata.js(1), protect.js(3), present.js(1) — all static templates, clearing operations, static SVGs, HTML entities, escaped user data (escapeHtml/escapeAttr), or escapeHtml helper internals.

present_module_review.innerHTML_note: Line 51: enterPresentation() builds fullscreen container with static HTML template. Only interpolated values are presentPage and state.totalPages — both numeric integers from internal state. No user-controlled strings in HTML.
present_module_review.user_data_handling: No user input handled. Module only reads from state.pdfDocument (already loaded PDF) and state.currentPage/totalPages (integers). Page info updated via textContent (line 225).
present_module_review.event_cleanup: Keyboard listener removed on cleanup (line 134). DOM container removed on exit. Timer interval cleared. All resources properly released.

protect_module_review.innerHTML_note: Line 719: updateSummary() builds HTML from hardcoded ternary strings only. Lines 770, 808: static SVG icons.
protect_module_review.crypto_implementation: Web Crypto API (crypto.subtle) for AES-128-CBC, pure JS MD5 and RC4 for PDF Standard Security Handler (V=4, R=4).

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split and convert module downloads

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js uses escapeHtml() in attribute contexts (title, value, aria-label) which does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. Should add escapeAttr() function.
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
notes: Full security review completed — 49 checks passed, 0 critical findings

NEW: Reviewed present.js module (389 lines, TASK-027 presentation/slideshow mode): 1 innerHTML usage is static HTML template with only numeric interpolation (presentPage, totalPages). Uses textContent for page info updates. No eval/Function/document.write. Proper cleanup on exit (event listeners removed, DOM removed, timers cleared). SECURE.
Updated innerHTML count: 55 usages across 19 files (up from 54/18 — +1 from present.js new module).
All JS files scanned: no eval(), Function(), document.write() found. No sensitive files or symlinks in webroot.
SSH: fail2ban total bans 3697 (+61 since last review). 6 IPs currently banned. Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (78 days remaining).
recommendations: LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js and use it for attribute contexts (title, value, aria-label) instead of escapeHtml()
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
